zh.Lallaing, 59327, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德拉萊艾
zh.Montigny-en-Ostrevent, Hauts de France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabeau Marie de Montigny於1308年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德時，她的父親Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe34歲，母親Marie de Haverskerque29歲。她於1330年與Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年享年61歲。

zh-hans.Lallaing, 59327, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德拉萊艾
zh-hans.Montigny-en-Ostrevent, Hauts de France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabeau Marie de Montigny于1308年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德时，她的父亲Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe34岁，母亲Marie de Haverskerque29岁。她于1330年与Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montigny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Henri, Jacques, Normand, Remi.

French: habitational name from (Le) Montigny, the name of several places in various parts of France (from a Gallo-Roman estate name, Montiniacum, formed either from a personal name or from a derivative of mons ‘mountain’ + the locative suffix -acum). Compare Demontigny .

variants.name: Demontigny
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aurele, Gilles, Jacques.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of several places in various parts of France named Montigny (see Montigny ).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabeau Marie de Montigny was born in 1308, in Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe, was 34 and her mother, Marie de Haverskerque, was 29. She married Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing in 1330. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1369, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabeau Marie de Montigny est née en 1308, à Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Marie de Haverskerque, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing en 1330. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1369, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabeau Marie de Montigny 1308 in Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe 34 und ihre Mutter Marie de Haverskerque 29. Sie hat 1330 Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1369 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau Marie de Montigny è nata il nel 1308 nel Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Marie de Haverskerque, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nel 1330. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1369, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Lallaing, 59327, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードラレイング
ja.Montigny-en-Ostrevent, Hauts de France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスノード
ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau Marie de Montignyが1308年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードで生まれた時，父Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christopheは34歳，母Marie de Haverskerqueは29歳であった。1330年にNicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau Marie de Montigny(이)가 1308년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Haverskerque(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1330년 Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau Marie de Montigny nasceu em 1308, em Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Haverskerque, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing em 1330. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1369, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabeau Marie de Montigny родилась в 1308 г. в местности норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Haverskerque, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing в 1330 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1369 г. в возрасте 61 год.

sm.from 1338 to 1369: mai le 1338 e o'o I le 1369

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabeau Marie de Montigny nació en 1308, en Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Eustache IV de Montigny, Seigneur de Montignies-Saint-Christophe, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Marie de Haverskerque, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing en 1330. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1369, a la edad de 61 años.
